title: OCI Identity Provider Created
description: Detects creation of a new identity provider (SAML/OIDC federation), which could indicate an attacker establishing persistent backdoor access via federated identity.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.createidentityprovider' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.createsaml2identityprovider')))
